mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mag_requirement_pool_item (project_id, state, revision_id, anchor_json, payload_json, assigned_decider_user_id, temporal_workflow_id) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{state}, #{revisionId}, #{anchorJson}, #{payloadJson}, #{assignedDeciderUserId}, #{temporalWorkflowId})
mapper.update: UPDATE mag_requirement_pool_item SET state = #{state}, revision_id = #{revisionId}, anchor_json = #{anchorJson}, payload_json = #{payloadJson}, assigned_decider_user_id = #{assignedDeciderUserId}, temporal_workflow_id = #{temporalWorkflowId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mag_requirement_pool_item WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY id DESC
